title: Playground Command Bar
concept: A minimalist expert workspace organized around a persistent command toolbar and a contextual drawer, keeping the live WordPress site visible while launch, save, management, Site Manager, and export/import operations are composed from compact menus.
focus: Light gray workspace with green status accents
flows: Launch source selection across Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, and .zip import
Save temporary Playground to browser storage with progress and saved identity
Save Playground to a local directory as a distinct destination
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with rename and delete consequences
Apply settings with saved reload and unsaved reset consequences
Inspect files, Blueprint JSON, database state, logs, and export/import results
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
